title: Common types for the simulation engine
description: Shared definitions referenced by actor, event, institution, cleavage, and resource schemas. See docs/research/malaysia-political-simulation-engine.md §3.

ULID.description: Universally unique, lexicographically sortable identifier. 26 chars, Crockford's base32.

ActorRef.description: Reference to an Actor by ULID.

EventRef.description: Reference to an Event by ULID.

InstitutionRef.description: Reference to an Institution by ULID.

CleavageRef.description: Reference to a Cleavage by ULID.

PartialDate.description: ISO 8601 year (YYYY), year-month (YYYY-MM), or full date (YYYY-MM-DD). Partial dates allowed for pre-modern events where day-precision is unknown.

Period.description: Regime period per malaysia-political-simulation-engine.md §1. P1 Sultanate (≈1400-1786), P2 Colonial (1786-1957), P3 Alliance (1957-1969), P4 NEP/BN (1969-1998), P5 Reformasi (1998-2008), P6 Tipping (2008-2018), P7 Hybrid (2018-present).

Confidence.description: Source-and-corroboration confidence. HIGH = primary-source documented; MED = widely-reported, multiple sources; LOW = estimate or inference.

SourceTier.description: 1 = primary (gazette, court ruling, EC record, Hansard, royal proclamation, audit, regulator filing). 2 = authoritative secondary (wire-service citing Tier 1, peer-reviewed, INSAP/IDEAS/ISIS). 3 = corroborative press, memoir. 4 = background commentary, social media. Per ADR-0005.

identifier.description: Case number, gazette ref, statute citation, etc.

LegitimacyDelta.description: Signed change in legitimacy for one or more institutions, keyed by InstitutionRef. Range [-1, 1]; convention: positive = legitimacy gained, negative = legitimacy lost.

salience_delta.description: Signed change in salience for this cleavage caused by the event.

year_basis.description: Nominal-year basis. If real-value normalisation is applied, this field records the deflator-base year.

real_basis_year.description: If present, amount is in real terms relative to this year. If absent, amount is nominal.
